name: feishu-emoji
description: 飞书表情包发送技能 - 让 OpenClaw AI 能够在飞书聊天中发送内联表情包图片
author: OpenClaw Community

usage.simple: curl -H 'Referer: https://fabiaoqing.com/' <图片 URL> -o /home/admin/.openclaw/media/inbound/emoji_xxx.jpg && message(action='send', message='文字', media='/home/admin/.openclaw/media/inbound/emoji_xxx.jpg')
